backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores Python lessons in a map and tracks per-user completion progress, pre-populated with 13+ lessons across Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced difficulties.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering a sticky header with logo and progress, difficulty filter bar, skeleton-loading lesson grid, and a lesson detail modal with overall completion tracking.
Reusable pill badge component that displays color-coded difficulty labels (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced) in two sizes.
frontend/src/components/LessonCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying a lesson's topic emoji, title, description excerpt, difficulty badge, and a completion checkmark icon.
frontend/src/components/LessonDetail.tsx: Modal dialog showing full lesson details with syntax-highlighted code, copy-to-clipboard, mark-as-complete button with loading state, and Escape/backdrop dismiss support.
React component that tokenizes and syntax-highlights Python code, rendering it in a table with line numbers and color-coded token types (keywords, builtins, strings, comments, etc.).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for listing lessons, fetching user progress, and marking a lesson complete by calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a dark code-editor theme with OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base/components/utilities layers, and custom component styles like code-block and lesson-card.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens for UI elements, difficulty levels, and code syntax highlighting, plus typography and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the app name (PyLearn Studio), existing features, and two pending feature requests to add more Python lessons to the backend.
